import io
import string

fn find_target(_ tokens: List<String>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut i = 0
  mut result: Option<Int> = None
  mut found = false
  while i < tokens.len()
    let s = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(s)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n == target and not found
      result = Some(i)
      found = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  match find_target(tokens, target)
  when Some(idx)
    print("index=#{idx}")
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
  Ok(())
end
